compiled_state.title: Create shared Figma tag constants file for design collaboration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf` containing shared tag constants for the Figma design collaboration workflow. These constants are consumed by stories S1 (this epic), S2 (approval), and S3 (sprint filtering).

File contents:
```
# Figma design collaboration tag constants
# Consumed by design-wireframe (S1), approval command (S2), and sprint filtering (S3)
TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT=design:awaiting_import
TAG_APPROVED=design:approved
```

Also create `tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh` verifying the constants file.

### Files to modify
- Create: `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf`
- Create: `tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh`

## TDD Requirement

Write the test file first. The test verifies:
(a) File exists at expected path
(b) Contains TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT=design:awaiting_import
(c) Contains TAG_APPROVED=design:approved
(d) File is sourceable in bash without errors

Test approach: Source the constants file in a bash subshell and verify environment variables are set to expected values.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf` exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf
- [ ] Constants file is sourceable and TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT is set correctly
  Verify: bash -c 'source plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf && [ "$TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT" = "design:awaiting_import" ]'
- [ ] Constants file is sourceable and TAG_APPROVED is set correctly
  Verify: bash -c 'source plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf && [ "$TAG_APPROVED" = "design:approved" ]'
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf` to `tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh`
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Batch 1 complete, all sub-agent ACs verified.
